scripts.build: pnpm --filter @aircraft/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @aircraft/design-tokens build && pnpm --filter @aircraft/ui build && next build
scripts.pages:build: pnpm --filter @aircraft/web build && pnpm --filter @aircraft/web export && pnpm --filter @aircraft/web postexport
scripts.postbuild: rm -rf .next/cache || true && rm -rf cache || true && rm -rf .vercel/output/static/cache || true && rm -rf .vercel/output/static/cache/webpack || true && find .vercel/output -type d -path "*/cache/webpack" -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
